candy.name: Candy Packaging
candy.subtitle: Card Candy Packaging
candy.description: High-speed pillow-style flow wrapping — the most popular method for trading card game (TCG) booster packs and collectible card sleeves. Produces a sealed candy-style wrapper at speeds up to 220 bags/min.
features: Servo-controlled bag length — set and cut, no empty travel
High-sensitivity photoelectric sensor tracking for precise sealing
Up to 60 packaging parameter presets stored on HMI
Anti-misoperation: auto-reverse when product switches
No-film auto-stop to prevent waste

self-adhesive.name: Self-Adhesive Strip Packaging
self-adhesive.subtitle: Card Self-Adhesive Strip Packaging
self-adhesive.description: Reclosable self-adhesive strip bags — ideal for premium card products requiring re-sealability. Each bag features a peel-and-seal strip for repeated opening and closing, protecting card quality during retail display and consumer use.
features: Three sealing methods: self-adhesive, hot-cut, or hot-press
Automatic correction to reduce packaging loss
Anti-air-bag detection — no material, no film wasted
Freely adjustable bag width for multi-spec products
One-click reset and bidirectional position control
Point memory for accurate counting and batch packing

four-sides.name: Four-Sides Sealed Packaging
four-sides.subtitle: Card Four Sides Sealed Packaging
four-sides.description: All-four-edges heat-sealed packaging — delivers a premium, tamper-evident presentation. The fully sealed edges protect against moisture and contamination, making it the preferred choice for high-value trading cards and collectible products.
features: Seven servo motors for ultra-stable operation
Three-color electric eye tracking for precise text/image alignment
Unique reciprocating cutting & heat-sealing technology
High-speed sealing — firm and stable at 150 packs/min
PLC programmable control with touch-screen HMI

banding.name: Banding Packaging
banding.subtitle: Card Banding Packaging
banding.description: Eco-friendly paper band bundling — the most sustainable packaging method for card decks. Uses minimal material while maintaining secure bundling, ideal for board game card decks and standard playing card sets.
features: Servo motor drive with PLC control and touch screen
Automatic card issuing + belt tying in one operation
Photoelectric control for automatic dispensing & bundling
Multiple function settings: card quantity, material, belt alarm
Product thickness range: 0.1–3mm
Max product size: 100×150mm

heat-shrink.name: Heat Shrink Packaging
heat-shrink.subtitle: Card Heat Shrink Packaging
heat-shrink.description: Tight-fitting shrink film wrapping — provides 360° product visibility while offering excellent protection. The shrink film conforms tightly to the product contour, creating a professional retail-ready presentation for card boxes and bundled products.
features: Imported detection photoelectric for thin/small packaging
Automatic feeding with electric eye + timer length adjustment
Sealing knife auto-protection prevents accidental cuts
Film up-down synchronization mechanism corrects deviation
Adjustable hot air direction for beautiful sealing lines

three-dimensional.name: Three-Dimensional Packaging

Sharp edges and premium presentation
Suitable for thick products (up to 65mm height)

items.question: What are the 6 packaging methods for game cards?
items.answer: The 6 main packaging methods for game cards are: Candy Packaging (pillow-style flow wrap), Self-Adhesive Strip Packaging (reclosable strip bag), Four-Sides Sealed Packaging (sealed on all edges), Banding Packaging (paper band bundling), Heat Shrink Packaging (shrink film wrapping), and Three-Dimensional Packaging (3D box-style wrap).

items.question: What is the production speed of card packaging machines?
items.answer: Production speeds vary by packaging method: Candy Packaging 20-220 bags/min, Self-Adhesive Strip 30-90 packs/min, Four-Sides Sealed 50-150 packs/min, Banding 5-20 packs/min, Heat Shrink 20-100 bags/min, and Three-Dimensional 40-80 bags/min.

items.question: Does CHANFER provide complete packaging production lines?
items.answer: Yes, CHANFER provides complete turnkey packaging lines including automatic card feeding, counting, packaging, cartoning, case packing, sealing, and robotic palletizing. We also offer a computer card dispatching system for intelligent card sorting.

items.question: What industries does CHANFER serve?
items.answer: CHANFER primarily serves the game card, board game, trading card, and paper printing industries. We also provide packaging solutions for food, medical, daily chemical, and hardware sectors.

hero.metaTitle: Card Packaging FAQ | CHANFER - Answers to Common Questions
hero.metaDescription: Find answers to common questions about card packaging methods, machines, production speeds, AI inspection, and complete packaging lines for trading cards and board games.

items.question: What are the 6 main packaging methods for game cards?
items.answer: The 6 main packaging methods for game cards are: Candy Packaging (pillow-style flow wrap), Self-Adhesive Strip Packaging (reclosable strip bag), Four-Sides Sealed Packaging (sealed on all edges), Banding Packaging (paper band bundling), Heat Shrink Packaging (shrink film wrapping), and Three-Dimensional Packaging (3D box-style wrap). Each method suits different card types, production volumes, and retail presentation requirements.

items.question: How to choose the right card packaging method?
items.answer: Choosing the right packaging method depends on: 1) Card type (trading cards, board game cards, collector cards), 2) Required production speed, 3) Whether resealability is needed, 4) Retail presentation requirements, 5) Budget, and 6) Sustainability goals. For TCG booster packs, candy wrapping is most popular. For premium collector cards, four-sides sealed or three-dimensional packaging is preferred. For eco-conscious brands, banding uses minimal material.

items.question: What is candy packaging for trading cards?
items.answer: Candy packaging, also known as pillow-style flow wrapping, is the most popular method for TCG booster packs and collectible card sleeves. It uses a continuous film that wraps around the product and seals both ends, creating a sealed candy-style wrapper at speeds up to 220 bags/min. This method is fast, cost-effective, and ideal for high-volume production.

items.question: What is self-adhesive strip packaging?
items.answer: Self-adhesive strip packaging creates reclosable bags with a peel-and-seal strip that allows repeated opening and closing. This method is ideal for premium card products requiring re-sealability, protecting card quality during retail display and consumer use. Production speed ranges from 30-90 packs/min.

items.question: What is four-sides sealed packaging?
items.answer: Four-sides sealed packaging heat-seals all four edges of the package, delivering a premium, tamper-evident presentation. The fully sealed edges protect against moisture and contamination, making it the preferred choice for high-value trading cards and collectible products. Speed: 50-150 packs/min.

items.question: What is banding packaging for cards?
items.answer: Banding packaging uses eco-friendly paper bands to bundle card decks together. It uses minimal material while maintaining secure bundling, making it the most sustainable packaging method. Ideal for board game card decks and standard playing card sets. Speed: 5-20 packs/min.

items.question: What is heat shrink packaging?
items.answer: Heat shrink packaging uses shrink film that conforms tightly to the product when heat is applied, providing 360-degree product visibility with excellent protection. It creates a professional retail-ready presentation for card boxes and bundled products. Speed: 20-100 bags/min.

items.question: What is three-dimensional packaging?
items.answer: Three-dimensional packaging creates a rigid, box-like package from a single sheet of film. It delivers a premium presentation with sharp edges and a solid feel, perfect for high-end collector products and gift sets. Speed: 40-80 bags/min.

items.question: What types of card packaging machines are available?
items.answer: CHANFER offers a full range of card packaging machines including: card feeding machines, card counting machines, card dispensing machines, pillow packaging machines, self-adhesive strip bagging machines, four-sides sealing machines, banding machines, heat shrink machines, 3D packaging machines, cartoning machines, case packing machines, sealing machines, robotic palletizing systems, and AI visual inspection systems.

items.question: What is the production speed of card packaging machines?
items.answer: Production speeds vary by packaging method: Candy Packaging 20-220 bags/min, Self-Adhesive Strip 30-90 packs/min, Four-Sides Sealed 50-150 packs/min, Banding 5-20 packs/min, Heat Shrink 20-100 bags/min, and Three-Dimensional 40-80 bags/min. Actual speed depends on card size, material, and line configuration.

items.question: How does a card feeding machine work?
items.answer: A card feeding machine automatically separates and feeds individual cards from a stack into the packaging line. It uses precision mechanical separation with servo-controlled feeding to ensure one-card-at-a-time delivery at high speeds, with sensors to detect double-feed or missing cards.

items.question: How does a card counting machine work?
items.answer: A card counting machine uses optical sensors and mechanical counting to accurately count cards as they pass through. It ensures each package contains the exact number of cards required, with 100% accuracy and real-time monitoring. Multiple counting stations can run simultaneously for multi-card packs.

items.question: What is a computer card dispatching system?
items.answer: CHANFER's computer card dispatching system uses a computer, card dispensing machines, and multiple card feeders to automatically sort and package cards according to pre-set recipes. You can edit sorting processes in Excel, store 1,000+ recipe files, handle 25,000 packs per batch, and it includes anti-error detection with AI visual inspection.

items.question: Can your machines handle different card sizes?
items.answer: Yes, CHANFER's machines are designed to handle a wide range of card sizes. Standard sizes include poker size (63x88mm), bridge size (56x88mm), mini cards, tarot cards, and custom sizes. Changeover between sizes typically takes 3-5 minutes with recipe-based switching.

items.question: Does CHANFER provide complete packaging production lines?
items.answer: Yes, CHANFER provides complete turnkey packaging lines including automatic card feeding, counting, packaging, cartoning, case packing, sealing, and robotic palletizing. We also offer a computer card dispatching system for intelligent card sorting. All equipment is integrated with smart control systems.

items.question: What does a complete card packaging line include?
items.answer: A complete card packaging line typically includes: 1) Card feeding and counting stations, 2) Card dispensing/sorting system, 3) Packaging machine (based on chosen method), 4) Cartoning machine, 5) Case packing machine, 6) Sealing machine, 7) Robotic palletizing, 8) AI visual inspection system, and 9) Smart control system with data tracking.

items.question: What is cartoning in card packaging?
items.answer: Cartoning is the process of placing packaged card products into cartons or boxes. CHANFER's automatic cartoning machines can handle various carton styles and sizes, with speeds up to 120 cartons/min. They integrate seamlessly with upstream packaging machines for continuous production.

items.question: What is case packing and palletizing?
items.answer: Case packing groups multiple cartons into shipping cases, while palletizing stacks cases onto pallets for transport. CHANFER uses collaborative robots (cobots) for safe, flexible palletizing that can handle different pallet patterns and heights, reducing labor and improving consistency.

items.question: How long does it take to set up a complete packaging line?
items.answer: A complete packaging line installation typically takes 2-4 weeks, including equipment setup, integration, testing, and operator training. CHANFER provides on-site installation and commissioning services, with remote support available for troubleshooting after handover.

items.question: How does AI visual inspection work for card packaging?
items.answer: CHANFER's AI visual inspection system uses high-speed cameras and machine learning algorithms to inspect cards in real-time at 400+ sheets/min. It detects wrong cards, missing cards, out-of-sequence cards, and quality defects. The system auto-alarms and shuts down on errors, ensuring 100% quality assurance.

items.question: What is the error rate of CHANFER's smart packaging line?
items.answer: CHANFER's smart packaging line achieves near-zero error rate through AI visual inspection, anti-error detection (white card/thickness/AI), and automated quality control. Traditional manual counting has a high error rate, but our system provides 100% real-time inspection with instant error alerts.

items.question: What quality certifications does CHANFER have?
items.answer: CHANFER holds ISO9001 Quality Management System certification, National High-Tech Enterprise certification, and Guangdong Province SRDI (Specialized, Refined, Unique & New) recognition. We have 100+ patents and CE certification for our equipment.

items.question: How to ensure packaging quality for trading cards?
items.answer: Packaging quality for trading cards is ensured through: 1) AI visual inspection at 400+ sheets/min, 2) Anti-error detection (white card, thickness, visual), 3) Automated counting with 100% accuracy, 4) Real-time monitoring and auto-alarm, 5) Quality data tracking, and 6) ISO9001-certified processes.

items.question: What is the changeover time for different card recipes?
items.answer: With CHANFER's smart card dispatching system, changeover between different card recipes takes only 3-5 minutes using recipe-based switching. The system can store 1,000+ process recipe files, compared to 30-60 minutes for traditional manual changeover.

items.question: What industries does CHANFER serve?
items.answer: CHANFER primarily serves the game card, board game, trading card, and paper printing industries. We also provide packaging solutions for food, medical, daily chemical, and hardware sectors. Our 8,000+ clients include the world's top printing and packaging companies.

items.question: Can your machines package TCG booster packs?
items.answer: Yes, TCG (Trading Card Game) booster packs are one of our primary applications. Candy packaging (flow wrapping) is the most popular method for TCG booster packs, with speeds up to 220 bags/min. We also provide multi-card sorting and dispatching for mixed-content booster packs.

items.question: Can your machines handle sports card packaging?
items.answer: Yes, sports card packaging is well within our capabilities. For premium sports cards, we recommend four-sides sealed packaging or three-dimensional packaging for tamper-evident, premium retail presentation. Our AI inspection ensures correct card sequencing for limited edition sets.

items.question: Can your machines package anime and collectible cards?
items.answer: Absolutely. Anime and collectible cards often require premium packaging for retail display. Our self-adhesive strip packaging (reclosable) and three-dimensional packaging are popular choices. The AI card dispatching system can handle complex card sorting recipes for collector sets.

items.question: Do you provide packaging solutions for board game components?
items.answer: Yes, CHANFER provides packaging solutions for board game cards, tokens, and components. Banding packaging is ideal for bundling card decks, while our multi-station lines can handle various component types in a single production run.

items.question: How to order a card packaging machine from CHANFER?
items.answer: To order a card packaging machine: 1) Contact us via WhatsApp (+86 13060985132) or email (sarah@gzchanfer.com), 2) Share your requirements (card type, size, speed, packaging method), 3) We provide a customized solution and quotation, 4) After order confirmation, production takes 4-8 weeks depending on line complexity, 5) Installation and training included.

items.question: Do you provide installation and training?
items.answer: Yes, CHANFER provides on-site installation, commissioning, and operator training for all equipment. Our engineers travel to your facility to set up the machines, integrate the line, test performance, and train your operators. Remote support is also available for troubleshooting.

items.question: What is the lead time for card packaging machines?
items.answer: Standard machine lead time is 4-6 weeks. Complete packaging lines take 6-8 weeks. Custom-engineered solutions may take 8-12 weeks. We maintain inventory of common components to expedite production. Contact us for current lead times.

items.question: Do you provide after-sales support and spare parts?
items.answer: Yes, CHANFER provides comprehensive after-sales support including: remote technical assistance, video troubleshooting, on-site service visits, and spare parts supply. We maintain a spare parts inventory and can ship commonly needed parts within 24-48 hours.

items.question: Can I visit your factory before ordering?
items.answer: Absolutely. We welcome factory visits at our Dongguan facility (Wanjin High-Tech Industrial Park) and Guangzhou office. You can see our machines in operation, discuss your requirements face-to-face, and meet our engineering team. Contact us to schedule a visit.

items.question: Do you provide contract packaging services?
items.answer: Yes, in addition to equipment manufacturing, CHANFER operates a 5,000-square-meter cleanroom facility for contract packaging. You provide the product and we handle everything else — packaging, quality inspection, cartoning, and shipping preparation — using our own equipment, staff, and packaging film.

candy.seoTitle: Candy Packaging Machine for Trading Cards | CHANFER
candy.seoDescription: High-speed candy packaging (flow wrapping) for TCG booster packs and collectible cards. Up to 220 bags/min with servo-controlled precision sealing. Complete production line available.
candy.keywords: candy packaging machine, card candy packaging, flow wrapping machine, TCG booster pack packaging, trading card packaging, pillow packaging, card flow wrap, collectible card packaging
longDescription: Candy packaging — also known as pillow-style flow wrapping — is the most widely used packaging method for trading card game (TCG) booster packs, collectible card sleeves, and game card multi-packs. This method wraps a continuous film around the card stack and heat-seals both ends, creating a sealed candy-style package that is tamper-evident, cost-effective, and ideal for high-volume production.

CHANFER's candy packaging line is built around a servo-controlled flow wrapping machine capable of producing up to 220 bags per minute. The servo motor drive ensures precise bag length control — set the length on the HMI touch screen and the machine cuts exactly where programmed, with no empty travel or film waste. A high-sensitivity photoelectric sensor tracks film registration marks for precise sealing alignment, even at maximum speed.

This packaging method is particularly popular among TCG publishers (such as Pokemon, Magic: The Gathering, and Yu-Gi-Oh! card manufacturers) because it delivers consistent, professional-looking packs at the speeds required for mass production. The candy wrapper provides excellent protection against moisture, dust, and tampering while allowing full-color printed film for retail shelf appeal.

The complete candy packaging production line integrates seamlessly with CHANFER's friction feeders, checkweighers, cartoning machines, case packers, and collaborative palletizing robots. Cards are fed and counted automatically, wrapped at high speed, checked for correct count and weight, cartoned, case-packed, sealed, and palletized — all with minimal operator intervention.

With up to 60 packaging parameter presets stored on the HMI, changeover between different card sizes or pack configurations takes only 3-5 minutes. The system also includes anti-misoperation features (auto-reverse when product switches) and no-film auto-stop protection to prevent waste and ensure continuous quality.
benefits: Highest production speed — up to 220 bags/min for maximum throughput
Lowest cost per pack — minimal film usage with servo-optimized cutting
Tamper-evident sealing — both ends heat-sealed for product integrity
Fast changeover — 60 preset recipes, 3-5 min switch between products
Full-color printed film support — retail-ready packaging with brand graphics
Seamless line integration — connects to feeding, cartoning, and palletizing

faqs.question: What is candy packaging for trading cards?
faqs.answer: Candy packaging (pillow-style flow wrapping) wraps a continuous film around the card stack and heat-seals both ends, creating a sealed candy-style package. It is the industry standard for TCG booster packs because it is fast (up to 220 bags/min), cost-effective, and provides tamper-evident protection with full-color printed film for retail appeal.

faqs.question: How fast is the candy packaging machine?
faqs.answer: CHANFER's candy packaging machine operates at 20-220 bags per minute, depending on card size, film type, and pack configuration. The servo-controlled system maintains precise sealing quality even at maximum speed.

faqs.question: What card sizes can the candy packaging machine handle?
faqs.answer: The machine handles card widths up to 220mm and product heights of 5-35mm. This covers all standard card sizes including poker size (63x88mm), bridge size (56x88mm), tarot cards, and multi-card booster packs.

faqs.question: Can the candy packaging line be integrated with cartoning and palletizing?
faqs.answer: Yes, the candy packaging line integrates seamlessly with CHANFER's cartoning machines, case packers, H-type carton sealers, and collaborative palletizing robots for a complete turnkey production line from card feeding to palletized shipping.

self-adhesive.seoTitle: Self-Adhesive Strip Packaging Machine for Cards | CHANFER
self-adhesive.seoDescription: Reclosable self-adhesive strip bagging machine for premium card products. Re-sealable bags with peel-and-seal strips. 30-90 packs/min. Three sealing methods available.
self-adhesive.keywords: self-adhesive strip packaging, reclosable card bag, re-sealable card packaging, card bagging machine, peel and seal packaging, premium card packaging, card strip bag, collectible card bag
longDescription: Self-adhesive strip packaging creates reclosable bags with a peel-and-seal strip that allows repeated opening and closing. This method is ideal for premium card products requiring re-sealability — collectors can open and close the package multiple times while keeping their cards protected.

CHANFER's self-adhesive strip bagging machine supports three sealing methods: self-adhesive strip (reclosable), hot-cut (permanent seal), and hot-press (permanent seal with premium finish). This versatility allows manufacturers to use the same machine for different product lines — from reclosable collector sets to permanently sealed retail packs.

The machine features automatic correction technology to reduce packaging loss, anti-air-bag detection (no material, no film wasted), and freely adjustable bag width for multi-specification products. One-click reset and bidirectional position control make changeover between product sizes quick and intuitive.

For premium card products, the self-adhesive strip method provides a retail-ready presentation that communicates quality. The clear film allows full product visibility while the reclosable strip adds functionality that consumers appreciate. Production speeds of 30-90 packs per minute balance quality and throughput for mid-volume premium production.

The complete line integrates with friction feeders for automatic card counting, cartoning machines for secondary packaging, and palletizing robots for end-of-line automation. Point memory functionality enables accurate counting and batch packing for limited edition sets.
benefits: Reclosable functionality — peel-and-seal strip for repeated opening
Three sealing methods in one machine — self-adhesive, hot-cut, hot-press
Premium retail presentation — clear film with quality strip closure
Anti-waste technology — no material, no film wasted
Flexible bag width — adjustable for multi-spec products
Point memory for accurate counting and batch packing

faqs.question: What is self-adhesive strip packaging for cards?
faqs.answer: Self-adhesive strip packaging creates reclosable bags with a peel-and-seal strip. The bag can be opened and closed multiple times, making it ideal for premium card products where consumers want to access their cards while keeping them protected. Production speed: 30-90 packs/min.

faqs.question: What sealing methods does the self-adhesive strip machine support?
faqs.answer: The machine supports three sealing methods: self-adhesive strip (reclosable), hot-cut (permanent seal), and hot-press (permanent seal with premium finish). This allows one machine to handle different product lines with different packaging requirements.

faqs.question: Is self-adhesive strip packaging suitable for retail display?
faqs.answer: Yes, self-adhesive strip packaging is ideal for retail display. The clear film provides full product visibility, the reclosable strip adds consumer-friendly functionality, and the premium finish communicates quality — making it perfect for collector card sets and limited edition products.

four-sides.seoTitle: Four-Sides Sealed Packaging Machine for Cards | CHANFER
four-sides.seoDescription: Premium four-sides sealed card packaging with tamper-evident sealing on all edges. 7 servo motors, 50-150 packs/min. Ideal for high-value trading cards and collectibles.
four-sides.keywords: four sides sealed packaging, card sealing machine, tamper-evident card packaging, premium card packaging, four-side seal, collectible card sealing, card heat sealing, servo sealing machine
longDescription: Four-sides sealed packaging heat-seals all four edges of the package, delivering a premium, tamper-evident presentation that is the preferred choice for high-value trading cards and collectible products. The fully sealed edges protect against moisture, dust, and contamination while creating a clean, professional look that communicates quality.

CHANFER's four-sides sealing machine is engineered with seven servo motors for ultra-stable operation at speeds up to 150 packs per minute. The seven-motor design distributes the mechanical load across multiple precision drives, ensuring consistent sealing pressure and temperature across all four edges — even during long production runs.

A key differentiator is the three-color electric eye tracking system, which provides precise text and image alignment on printed films. This ensures that graphics, barcodes, and text are perfectly positioned on every package — critical for brand consistency and retail compliance. The unique reciprocating cutting and heat-sealing technology produces firm, stable seals at high speed without compromising quality.

The PLC programmable control system with touch-screen HMI allows operators to store and recall multiple product configurations, making changeover between different card sizes and film types quick and error-free. The machine handles product sizes from 100x100mm to 200x250mm with thicknesses of 1-10mm — covering all standard card formats and multi-card packs.

For collectible card manufacturers, four-sides sealed packaging provides the ultimate combination of protection and presentation. The tamper-evident design gives consumers confidence in product authenticity, while the clean edge seal creates a premium look that stands out on retail shelves.
benefits: Tamper-evident — all four edges sealed for product authenticity
Moisture and contamination protection — fully sealed perimeter
Premium presentation — clean edges communicate quality
Seven servo motors — ultra-stable at 150 packs/min

Reciprocating cutting technology — firm, stable seals at high speed

faqs.question: What is four-sides sealed packaging?
faqs.answer: Four-sides sealed packaging heat-seals all four edges of the package, creating a tamper-evident, fully enclosed wrap. It is the preferred choice for high-value trading cards and collectible products because it provides maximum protection against moisture and contamination while delivering a premium retail presentation.

faqs.question: How fast is the four-sides sealing machine?
faqs.answer: CHANFER's four-sides sealing machine operates at 50-150 packs per minute, powered by seven servo motors that ensure consistent sealing quality even at maximum speed. The reciprocating cutting and heat-sealing technology maintains firm, stable seals throughout the production run.

faqs.question: What makes four-sides sealed packaging tamper-evident?
faqs.answer: All four edges of the package are heat-sealed, creating a fully enclosed wrap that cannot be opened without visibly damaging the packaging. This tamper-evident feature gives consumers confidence in product authenticity — particularly important for high-value collectible cards.

banding.seoTitle: Card Banding Machine for Board Game Cards | CHANFER
banding.seoDescription: Eco-friendly paper band bundling machine for card decks. Servo-driven with PLC control. Handles cards 0.1-3mm thick. Ideal for board game cards and playing card sets.
banding.keywords: card banding machine, paper band packaging, card bundling machine, board game card packaging, playing card bundling, eco-friendly card packaging, card deck banding, paper banding
longDescription: Banding packaging uses eco-friendly paper bands to bundle card decks together — the most sustainable packaging method in CHANFER's portfolio. By using minimal material while maintaining secure bundling, banding reduces packaging waste and cost while providing a clean, professional presentation ideal for board game card decks and standard playing card sets.

CHANFER's banding machine combines servo motor drive with PLC control and touch-screen operation. The system performs automatic card issuing and belt tying in a single operation — cards are counted, stacked, and banded without manual intervention. Photoelectric control ensures accurate dispensing and bundling, with adjustable settings for card quantity, material type, and belt alarm thresholds.

The machine handles a wide range of product specifications: thickness from 0.1mm to 3mm and maximum product size of 100x150mm. This covers standard playing cards (0.3mm), multi-layer card decks (up to 3mm), and various board game card formats. Multiple function settings allow operators to quickly switch between different deck sizes and quantities.

For environmentally conscious brands, banding offers a significant sustainability advantage over plastic-based packaging methods. The paper bands are biodegradable, recyclable, and use a fraction of the material compared to flow wrapping or shrink packaging. This aligns with growing consumer demand for eco-friendly packaging in the board game and tabletop gaming industry.

While banding operates at a lower speed (5-20 packs/min) compared to flow wrapping, it excels in applications where sustainability, simplicity, and cost-effectiveness are prioritized over maximum throughput. The complete line integrates with cartoning machines and palletizing robots for end-to-end automation.
benefits: Most eco-friendly option — biodegradable paper bands, minimal material
Lowest packaging cost — paper bands are economical vs. plastic film
Servo-driven precision — PLC control with touch-screen HMI
One-step operation — card issuing and banding in a single pass
Flexible thickness range — handles 0.1-3mm cards and multi-deck bundles
Sustainable branding — communicates environmental responsibility

faqs.question: What is banding packaging for cards?

faqs.question: What card thickness can the banding machine handle?
faqs.answer: CHANFER's banding machine handles card thicknesses from 0.1mm to 3mm and maximum product size of 100x150mm. This covers standard playing cards, multi-card decks, and various board game card formats.

faqs.answer: Yes, banding is the most eco-friendly packaging method in our portfolio. Paper bands are biodegradable, recyclable, and use a fraction of the material compared to plastic film packaging. This makes it ideal for environmentally conscious board game and tabletop gaming brands.

heat-shrink.seoTitle: Heat Shrink Packaging Machine for Card Boxes | CHANFER
heat-shrink.seoDescription: Professional heat shrink wrapping for card boxes and bundled products. 360° product visibility with tight-fitting shrink film. 20-100 bags/min. Retail-ready presentation.
heat-shrink.keywords: heat shrink packaging, shrink wrap machine, card shrink wrapping, card box packaging, shrink film packaging, retail card packaging, POF shrink wrap, card bundle packaging
longDescription: Heat shrink packaging uses shrink film that conforms tightly to the product when heat is applied, providing 360-degree product visibility with excellent protection. The shrink film creates a professional, retail-ready presentation that is ideal for card boxes, bundled products, and multi-pack configurations.

CHANFER's heat shrink line combines a flow packing machine with a shrinking tunnel. The flow wrapper first seals the product in film, then the shrinking tunnel applies controlled heat to shrink the film tightly around the product. The result is a smooth, wrinkle-free package that showcases the product while providing robust protection.

The system is equipped with an imported detection photoelectric sensor specifically designed for thin and small packaging — ensuring precise film feeding and cutting even for compact card products. The sealing knife features auto-protection to prevent accidental cuts and operator injury, while the film up-down synchronization mechanism corrects deviation for consistent packaging quality.

For retail display, heat shrink packaging offers several advantages. The transparent film provides full product visibility, allowing consumers to see the card box or product inside. The tight-fitting wrap communicates quality and newness, while the adjustable hot air direction creates beautiful, consistent sealing lines that enhance shelf appeal.

The complete heat shrink line integrates with friction feeders for automatic card counting, flow packing machines for initial wrapping, cartoning machines for secondary packaging, and collaborative palletizing robots for end-of-line automation. Production speeds of 20-100 bags per minute accommodate both mid-volume and high-volume production requirements.
benefits: 360° product visibility — transparent film for full product display
Tight-fitting protection — shrink film conforms to product contour
Retail-ready presentation — professional look for shelf display
Imported photoelectric sensor — precise for thin/small packaging
Sealing knife auto-protection — operator safety built-in
Adjustable hot air direction — beautiful, consistent sealing lines

faqs.question: What is heat shrink packaging for cards?
faqs.answer: Heat shrink packaging wraps products in shrink film, then applies heat to shrink the film tightly around the product. It provides 360-degree visibility with excellent protection, making it ideal for card boxes, bundled products, and retail-ready presentations. Speed: 20-100 bags/min.

faqs.question: What products are suitable for heat shrink packaging?
faqs.answer: Heat shrink packaging is ideal for card box multi-pack bundling, retail-ready card presentations, transparent display packaging, and shelf-ready card products. It works particularly well for products that benefit from full visibility combined with secure, professional wrapping.

faqs.question: How does the shrink wrapping process work?
faqs.answer: The process has two stages: first, a flow packing machine seals the product in shrink film; second, a shrinking tunnel applies controlled heat to shrink the film tightly around the product. The result is a smooth, wrinkle-free package with professional sealing lines.

CHANFER's three-dimensional packaging machine uses servo-controlled precision to transform flat film into a structured 3D package. ai-visual.seoTitle: KKR-C02 AI Card Visual Inspection System | CHANFER
ai-visual.seoDescription: AI-powered card inspection with OCR and mixed-order detection. 400+ sheets/min. 100% error detection. Detects wrong, missing, and out-of-sequence cards.
ai-visual.keywords: AI visual inspection, card inspection system, KKR-C02, AI card sorting, OCR card inspection, card quality inspection, visual inspection machine, card error detection
longDescription: The KKR-C02 is an AI-powered card visual inspection system that detects wrong cards, missing cards, and out-of-sequence cards at speeds over 400 sheets per minute with 100% error detection rate. Using high-speed cameras and machine learning algorithms, it inspects cards in real-time and can detect errors in regions as small as 5x5mm.

The system features OCR character detection (Chinese, English, numbers), mixed-order detection in 100ms, and AI self-training for new card templates — new batch training takes as little as 3 minutes. When an error is detected, the system auto-alarms and can trigger production line shutdown for immediate correction.
ai-visual.ctaTitle: Interested in the KKR-C02 AI Inspection System?
ai-visual.ctaDescription: Get detailed specifications, pricing, and integration guidance for the KKR-C02 AI visual inspection system.
